stemHtml:
Refer to figure or to CAP 698 figure 2.2.
Calculate the take-off distance required for a performance class B single engine piston aircraft, engaging in Commercial Air Transport operations, using the following information.

Aerodrome pressure altitude: 1000 ft
OAT: +25°C
Take off mass: 3600 lb
Wind component: 10 kt headwind
Runway surface: 5 cm grass, dry (correction factor 1.2)
Aerodrome field lengths unbalanced
Regulatory factor (CAT): 1.15
